task_completion.description: Draw a closed triangle in a 2D sketch
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three connected line segments forming a closed triangle shape in the main drawing canvas.

task_completion.description: Apply a right angle constraint to the triangle
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 90-degree angle constraint between two legs, or horizontal and vertical constraint icons applied to the two adjacent legs of the triangle.
A visible length dimension constraint showing exactly '30' or '30.00' on one of the legs forming the right angle.

task_completion.description: Constrain the second leg to exactly 40mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible length dimension constraint showing exactly '40' or '40.00' on the other leg forming the right angle.

task_completion.description: Ensure the sketch is fully constrained
task_completion.visual_evidence: The property browser/text window indicates 'ok, 0 degrees of freedom' or the sketch lines change to the fully constrained color indicator.

task_completion.description: Save the file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' and the filename 'right_triangle.slvs', or the application title bar displaying 'right_triangle.slvs' after saving.

integrity.description: Agent used the CAD software GUI to create the sketch
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking tools, selecting lines, and entering dimensions in the CAD software (SolveSpace) rather than generating the file via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write the .slvs file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the graphical interface of the CAD program, not typing raw file format data into a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent is using the actual CAD application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window shows the standard SolveSpace interface with toolbars, property browser, and 3D/2D canvas, not a mock-up or image viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/right_triangle.slvs'. The right triangle must have one leg constrained to exactly 30.0 mm and the other leg constrained to exactly 40.0 mm. The sketch must be fully constrained (typically indicated by '0 degrees of freedom' in SolveSpace).
